title: Strategy situation ‘out of hand,’ says Arca exec on $15B preferred stock burden
summary: Strategy situation ‘out of hand,’ says Arca exec on $15B preferred stock burden
briefing: Strategy’s capital structure may be under pressure as Arca’s Jeff Dorman highlights $15 billion in preferred stock obligations and CEO comments on possible Bitcoin sales.

title: Texas Bitcoin reserve plans shift from ETF to direct BTC custody
summary: Texas Bitcoin reserve plans shift from ETF to direct BTC custody
briefing: Texas is hiring a crypto custodian to move its $10 million Strategic Bitcoin Reserve from BlackRock’s IBIT ETF into directly held coins and build full state‑level BTC plumbing.

title: DxSale drained for $7.3M in BNB Chain liquidity exploit
summary: DxSale drained for $7.3M in BNB Chain liquidity exploit
briefing: DxSale was drained for about $7.3 million from BNB Chain liquidity providers, raising fresh concerns over old DeFi locker contracts.

title: OKX Ventures, Korea Investment & Securities to buy 19.6% Coinone stake for $106M
summary: OKX Ventures, Korea Investment & Securities to buy 19.6% Coinone stake for $106M
briefing: OKX Ventures and KIS to invest $53 million each for a 19.6% stake in Coinone, deepening ties between traditional finance and crypto in South Korea’s tightly regulated market.

title: SEC approves Paxos as ‘blockchain-native’ clearing agency
summary: SEC approves Paxos as ‘blockchain-native’ clearing agency
briefing: Paxos says its approval as a blockchain-focused clearing agency represents a “critical piece of financial market infrastructure” as Wall Street becomes more interested in crypto.

title: Bitcoin’s major holders halt buys as demand slows: CryptoQuant
summary: Bitcoin’s major holders halt buys as demand slows: CryptoQuant
briefing: CryptoQuant says that the holding structure for large Bitcoin holders is deteriorating, a trend that has historically preceded “sustained price weakness.”

title: Sui Network back online after ‘crash bug’ causes 6-hour outage
summary: Sui Network back online after ‘crash bug’ causes 6-hour outage
briefing: The Sui mainnet has resumed after a bug in a network update took it offline for 5 hours and 55 minutes.

title: Bitcoin’s trapped under $74K while $9B options expiry looms: Are bears back in control?
summary: Bitcoin’s trapped under $74K while $9B options expiry looms: Are bears back in control?
briefing: Bears hold the upper hand for Friday's $9 billion options expiry, keeping Bitcoin under pressure amid heavy ETF outflows and corporate selling

title: Morning Minute: Hyperliquid Is 'Bigger Than Nasdaq'
summary: Morning Minute: Hyperliquid Is 'Bigger Than Nasdaq'
briefing: The man who built the modern NYSE just said Hyperliquid is bigger than Nasdaq. JPMorgan says the debasement trade is unwinding.

title: Ukrainian Police Officers Allegedly Kidnapped Crypto Entrepreneurs to Extort Millions
summary: Ukrainian Police Officers Allegedly Kidnapped Crypto Entrepreneurs to Extort Millions
briefing: Prosecutors say two police colonels organized an extortion ring that allegedly tracked, abducted, and held crypto entrepreneurs at gunpoint.

title: Paxos Secures SEC Registration as Clearing Agency
summary: Paxos Secures SEC Registration as Clearing Agency
briefing: The approval makes Paxos the “only blockchain-native firm” approved by the SEC to operate as a registered clearing agency in the U.S.

title: Anthropic Nears $1 Trillion Valuation, Topping OpenAI After Fresh $65 Billion Raise
summary: Anthropic Nears $1 Trillion Valuation, Topping OpenAI After Fresh $65 Billion Raise
briefing: Claude maker Anthropic said annualized revenue surpassed $47 billion as it expands cloud and compute partnerships.

title: AI Agents Are Learning to Predict What Users Want—Before They Ask for It
summary: AI Agents Are Learning to Predict What Users Want—Before They Ask for It
briefing: Researchers in China built a model that uses an AI’s downtime to prepare for users’ next question before they ask it.

title: Sui Network Goes Down for Hours, Just Months After the Last Downtime
summary: Sui Network Goes Down for Hours, Just Months After the Last Downtime
briefing: Blockchain network Sui is suffering another period of significant downtime barely five months after the last "network stall."

title: Apple iOS 27 Leaks: Siri Is Being Remade to Be More Like ChatGPT
summary: Apple iOS 27 Leaks: Siri Is Being Remade to Be More Like ChatGPT
briefing: Rendered illustrations published ahead of WWDC 2026 reveal a dedicated Siri app, Dynamic Island integration, and a Google Gemini backbone—the biggest overhaul to the assistant in nearly 15 years.

title: Kalshi Sues to Stop Minnesota From Enforcing America’s First Prediction Market Ban
summary: Kalshi Sues to Stop Minnesota From Enforcing America’s First Prediction Market Ban
briefing: Prediction market giant Kalshi has asked a federal judge to prevent Minnesota from allowing the ban to go into effect in August.
